result.content:
# Image Generation Package

## User Prompt
Create a YouTube thumbnail image for a dramatic sci-fi story

## Visual Intent
- subject clarity
- strong silhouette
- readable composition
- high-impact focal point

## Style
- cinematic illustrated
- non-photoreal by default
- production-ready prompt scaffold

## Prompt Package
Subject: Create a YouTube thumbnail image for a dramatic sci-fi story
Style: cinematic illustrated
Lighting: dramatic readable lighting
Composition: centered focal subject with depth
Quality: highly detailed stylized concept art

## Pattern
default_image_v1
